zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Hoghton於1542年出生在英國藍卡爾霍格頓 堂爾時，她的父親Richard Houghton46歲，母親Alice Elizabeth Morley39歲。她於1569年與Thome Lister在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1599年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾吉斯本享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Hoghton于1542年出生在英国藍卡爾霍格頓 堂爾时，她的父亲Richard Houghton46岁，母亲Alice Elizabeth Morley39岁。她于1569年与Thome Lister在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1599年在英国英格兰藍卡爾吉斯本享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hoghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Houghton
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Hoghton was born in 1542, in Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard Houghton, was 46 and her mother, Alice Elizabeth Morley, was 39. She married Thome Lister in 1569, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1599, in Gisburn, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

Elle a épousé Thome Lister en 1569, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1599, à Gisburn, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Hoghtonが1542年にイギリスランカシュアイアホートン トウエルで生まれた時，父Richard Houghtonは46歳，母Alice Elizabeth Morleyは39歳であった。1569年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンでThome Listerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1599年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアギスブルンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hoghton(이)가 1542년 영국 랭카실르 호그h턴 타워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Houghton(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Elizabeth Morley(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1569년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 Thome Lister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 지스번에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Hoghton родилась в 1542 г. в местности хогтон тоуир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Houghton было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Elizabeth Morley, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thome Lister в 1569 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1599 г. в местности гисбурн, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
